steps.title: See the cause
steps.content: The mother elephant wants to make sure her calf is safe. The next sentence gives the action she takes because of that concern: she releases an infrasonic call.

steps.title: Rule out other signals
steps.content: Choice A signals an example, Choice C signals a time shift, and Choice D signals similarity. None of those relationships explains why the mother releases the call.

steps.title: Choose the causal transition
steps.content: For this reason connects the mother's concern for safety to the action she takes as a result. The answer is B.
